node.text:
“If you bet against me, you’ll go broke.” 

Growing up in Florida, a lot of people told @flaamingoo_ that he wasn’t going to be good enough. But all that doubt just added fuel to the fire, because his favourite thing to do is prove people wrong.

Now he’s looking to become the first back-to-back 110m world champion in 19 years. And while some think the odds are stacked against him, for Grant, it’s just another hurdle to clear.

node.text:
“I want to show the world that it’s okay to talk.”

In a game where ego is everything, @nojo18 isn’t afraid to leave his at the door. 

After the hardest year he’s ever faced, the champion is back to defend his world crown. But it’s his legacy off the track that’s motivating him to run beyond the noise.

node.text:
Nine athletes. One shared vision. 

In Eugene, Oregon the fastest athletes in the world are ready to battle it out for the season's ultimate prize.

But while some measure success in medals, @ajeelenee, @erriyon.k, @flaamingoo_ , @hey_itsshaunae, @ken_aye_, @nojo18, @speedystevie, @tamari.davis and @waydedreamer have their sights set on so much more.

Discover the long, slow run with ADISTAR CS.

No set time, no target pace, just a craving for greater distances. Run in total comfort meditate on your breath and steps, and connect with your surroundings. 

Ready? Set. Go - slow

node.text:
6,760,161 runners. 

Over 189 countries worldwide. 

One common goal. 

We came together to help turn the tide on plastic waste. You laced up and you ran for change.

We’ve come a long way and won't stop here. Together, impossible is nothing. 

Find out more and join the movement at adidas.com/runfortheoceans

@parley.tv 

#RunForTheOceans #adidasParley #ImpossibleIsNothing

node.text:
"Women running the marathon has been nothing less than a social revolution" — @kathrineswitzer.

Fifty years ago, eight trailblazers ran the first official women's race at @bostonmarathon ®. Since then, more than 250,000 women have followed in their footsteps.

On 18 April, thousands more will become part of the legacy. #ImpossibleIsNothing

ADIZERO X ALLBIRDS 2.94 KG CO2E

The lowest carbon emissions performance running shoe we have ever created. An evolution of the FUTURECRAFT.FOOTPRINT, our first shoe to ever go below 3kg CO2e per pair: 2.94kg to be precise. 

Shop the link in bio. Now in four colorways, availability may vary across regions.​​

#adidasxAllbirds

node.text:
Starting at the iconic @bostonmarathon®, bib 321 will now be held for a neurodivergent athlete each year for the first time in sports history. This year, triathlete @chrisnikic will be #Runner321, inspiring others in his community to see what’s possible. Join the movement at Runner321.com

#WorldDownSyndromeDay #ImpossibleIsNothing #InclusionMeans #Boston126

node.text:
Another year that went by… 𝘧𝘢𝘴𝘵. A new age of running innovation and culture.​
​
Three world records. The first-ever sub-six-hour 100km. Thirty-two major medals in Tokyo, and 18 of 42 podium positions across the globe’s seven major marathons.​
​
From New York to Nardò, we collaborated with those who share our visions of speed and style to redefine what’s possible; one team behind the dream. ​
​
Here’s to next year – and all the excitement to come.​
​
 #YouGotThis​
